alerts.title: Only 1 in 4 F-35s is fully mission capable, GAO finds
alerts.summary: The F-35’s readiness rates continued to decline through fiscal 2025, with the fleet’s full mission capable rate falling to 25%, according to a GAO report.

alerts.title: Zimbabwe moves to regulate crypto sector, requiring firms to register with central bank: Reuters
alerts.summary: Registration costs an initial $500 with renewal costing $400 a year, and operating without registration is now an offense, according to Reuters.
alerts.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

alerts.title: British high school sends students home following cyberattack
alerts.summary: Great Marlow School, which has 1,428 pupils according to the Department for Education (DfE), said it was set to remain closed while it works with specialist IT and cybersecurity professionals to resolve the issue.
